rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §29.9015 governs ASVAB testing in schools. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operational overlap.
quote: each school year each school district and open-enrollment charter school shall provide students in grades 10 through 12 an opportunity to take the Armed Services Vocational Aptitude Battery test
_note: No conflict; rule_text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
